subcodes.first_line: O Thou All-Knowing God, O Thou Compassionate Lord! These pure souls, content and well-pleased, were ever confident in Thy favours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ایزد دانا ای خداوند مهربان این نفوس زکیه راضیه مرضیه مطمئن بالطاف تو بودند
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God
